metadata.title: YOUR META TITLE — max 60 chars, include primary keyword
metadata.description: Your meta description — 140 to 160 characters, written to earn a click. Describe the page's value clearly.

hero.title: Your Full H1 Headline — Can Be Longer Than the Meta Title

author.name: Bradley A. Pistotnik (Trial Lawyer)
author.bio: Brad Pistotnik is the CEO of Bull Attorneys®, P.A. and a Kansas trucking and personal injury lawyer with over 45 years of experience. He focuses on serious injury and truck accident cases involving DOT regulations and commercial vehicle safety standards.

schema.headline: Your Full H1 Headline — same as hero.title
schema.description: Your meta description — same as metadata.description
schema.articleBody: A plain-text 2 to 4 sentence summary of the article. No HTML. This is used for schema markup only and is not shown to readers.

featuredImage.alt: Descriptive alt text for the featured image — you write this

intro: Optional introductory paragraph before the first question. If not needed, leave intro as an empty array and remove this string.

sections.heading: First question as a heading?
intro: Answer paragraph two — each paragraph is a separate string in this array.

sections.heading: A question whose answer includes a bullet list?

postCtaContact.heading: Call Bull Attorneys 24/7 From Anywhere in Kansas
postCtaContact.intro: Bull Attorneys, P.A. answers calls 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including holidays, and handles car, truck, motorcycle, and personal injury cases across Kansas from offices in Wichita and Garden City.

offices.label: Garden City office:
offices.address: 3102 E Kansas Ave #100, Garden City, KS 67846

legalDisclaimer.heading: Legal Advertising Disclaimer
legalDisclaimer.text: This blog provides general information only, not legal advice. Reading it does not create an attorney-client relationship. Every case is different. Results vary depending on each case's facts and legal circumstances. Deadlines and laws can change, so speak directly with an attorney about your accident.
